# REAL capture 2026-06-10 — Claude Code immediately after a completed turn.
# KEY: "✻ Baked for 3s" PERSISTS after completion → ✻✶✢ glyphs are NOT
# busy-markers; the only reliable working indicator is "esc to interrupt".
❯ In one short sentence: what does the acronym PTY stand for and what is it?\r

● PTY stands for "pseudo-terminal" (or pseudo-teletype) — a software emulation of a physical terminal that lets programs like shells or terminal emulators communicate as if connected to real
  terminal hardware.

✻ Baked for 3s
